item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 14,298 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Recently_Updated Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Double under Toreando Leg drag S grip Lapel choke defence Sid...

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes Back, standing Gameplan README Empty_Pages Formatting index Banana split Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke .

item.title: Back, standing
item.description: Possibly after Arm drag or otherwise you both are standing and you have obtained opponents back.

item.title: Arm drag
item.description: Both arms on opponents single arm and sweeping motion downward, forcing the opponent to lose balance and likely post with knee and/or other hand Control sleeve with “inner” arm in downward motion and transition to Single leg “Hopping” around can be stopped by hooking behind the leg Can be used as pa...

item.title: Feinting
item.description: Doing an action of revealing and opening in order to trick opponent to act a certain way.

item.title: Stacking
item.description: The general concept of applying downward pressure with gravity to seem heavier and allows for effective Passing techniques.

item.title: Sacrifice elbow drop
item.description: General Steps Ideally obtain: Left hand grips opponent sleeve Right hand grips cross collar Push on collar with stiff arm Sleeve pulling downward Inverse the motion to backward Drop to “hiihtoliike” with legs Pull back on the collar hand and land on elbow Move sleeve grip to opponents thigh Turn ove...

item.title: Z guard
item.description: General Variant of Half guard, which should prevent Stacking and therefore allow you to prevent opponent from passing as easily.

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Empty_Pages Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Hook Drills Double leg Rubber guard .
